title: mentha limonia
intro: Mentha limonia, also known as East Indian mint or Bergamot mint, is a tropical plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Asia and Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha limonia include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and herbal practices.
